page_header.label: CHANGELOG
page_header.title: What's New
page_header.description: Protocol updates and version history. Every change, improvement, and new feature documented transparently.

items: Multi-page marketing site with comprehensive trust-building content
Security, audits, open source, and roadmap transparency pages
Developer documentation with integration examples and API references
Ecosystem page showcasing compatible wallets and future integrations
Brand guidelines page with design system documentation
Navigation redesigned to support multi-page site architecture
Enhanced brutalist design system with consistent glass-morphism components
@zkira/sdk TypeScript package with full API coverage
@zkira/widget embeddable React component for websites
REST API with OpenAPI specification and API key authentication
Enhanced Telegram bot with /send and /request commands
Gas relayer performance with 50% faster claim processing
Error handling and user feedback across all interfaces
Core stealth address cryptography with ECDH key derivation
Payment escrow Anchor programs with time-lock functionality
Pay web application with wallet integration and QR support
Gas relayer service for sponsored claim transactions
Devnet deployment with full testing environment
Built on Solana with Anchor framework for smart contracts
Next.js frontend with Wallet Adapter integration
Ed25519 signatures for all transaction authorization

sections.label: VERSIONING POLICY
sections.title: Semantic Versioning
sections.subtitle: We follow semantic versioning (SemVer) for clear communication about the nature and impact of changes.

items.title: MAJOR
items.subtitle: X.0.0
items.description: Breaking changes that require updates to integrations. Reserved for protocol-level modifications.

items.title: MINOR
items.subtitle: 0.X.0
items.description: New features and capabilities that maintain backward compatibility with existing integrations.

items.title: PATCH
items.subtitle: 0.0.X
items.description: Bug fixes, performance improvements, and security patches that don't change functionality.

items.title: ADDED
items.description: New features, capabilities, and functionality that enhance the protocol without changing existing behavior.

items.title: CHANGED
items.description: Modifications to existing functionality that may affect user experience but maintain API compatibility.

items.title: FIXED
items.description: Bug fixes, security patches, and corrections that resolve issues without adding new functionality.

items.title: REMOVED
items.description: Deprecated features, discontinued functionality, and breaking changes that remove existing capabilities.

sections.label: STAY UPDATED
sections.title: Never Miss an Update
sections.subtitle: Get notified about new releases and important updates through multiple channels.

items.title: GitHub Releases
items.description: Watch our repositories for release notifications with detailed changelog information.

items.title: Developer Newsletter
items.description: Monthly updates with in-depth technical details and upcoming feature previews.

items.title: RSS Feed
items.description: Add our changelog RSS feed to your reader for automated update notifications.

sections.title: Try the latest version
sections.description: Experience the latest features and improvements in ZKIRA Pay. Create your first confidential payment link today.
